mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MUTUAL_EVALUATION (EVAL_ID, DETAIL_ID, TARGET_ID, QUESTION_ID, ANSWER_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (MUTUAL_EVALUATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{detailId}, #{targetId}, #{questionId}, #{answerId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MUTUAL_EVALUATION ME WHERE ME.DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT AD.DETAIL_ID FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD WHERE AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = ( SELECT ATTENDANCE_ID FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID = #{detailId} ) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MANNER_HISTORY(MANNER_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, REASON_ID, SCORE, CREATED_AT) VALUES(MANNER_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, (SELECT USER_ID FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}), 2, 0.2, SYSDATE )
